title: [Let's Do] Bakery - Farm&Charm Compat
description:
Bake many variations of Bread, Cupcakes and Cakes! Eatable, placeable.

This version was made for improved compat with [Let's Do] Farm & Charm
body:
![Bakery](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/bakery.png)

Sweet Pastries & Golden Crusts

The baking extension to Farm & Charm


"Fresh from the oven"


Bakery transforms your kitchen into a full pastry workshop. Knead the dough, glaze your creations, stack your cakes high and fill your shelves with golden loaves and colorful sweets.
Turn your bakery dreams into reality and build the coziest patisserie in the village.
Bakery expands the culinary depth of the Let's Do collection with layered crafting steps, decorative displays, and flavorful food effects designed to complement Farm & Charm.
## Craft & Create
- Bread, cupcakes, cakes, tarts, pastries and more - Multi-step preparation with Glazing, Baking and Caking stations - Stackable sweet effects that reward indulgence in moderation - Saturated meals that provide longer-lasting nourishment
Precision, patience, and perfect timing.
## Flavorful Effects
- Sweets grant short but powerful boosts to speed and strength - Effects stack up to ten times for those who dare - Hearty baked goods provide increased satiation and reduce hunger loss
Enjoy responsibly.
## Decorative Delights
- Cakestands and breadbaskets to display your creations - Outdoor café furniture to design your dream bakery - Placeable breads and pastries that double as decor - Seamless integration with Farmers Delight, Candlelight and more
Have fun baking.
Requires [Let's Do] Farm & Charm

Preheat the oven.

Knead the dough.

Bake with heart.


Dedicated to MissLilitu


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.


GitHub • Discord • Patreon
